name: Goal Tracker
description: Manage long-term goals that persist across sessions. Use this to create, update, check progress on, or list goals. Goals are stored permanently and the AI should review them periodically to make autonomous progress. Actions: 'add', 'update_progress', 'complete', 'list', 'delete'.

goal_id.description: Goal ID (required for update_progress, complete, delete)

title.description: Short title of the goal (required for 'add')

description.description: Full description of the goal and how to achieve it
